traits.name: guarded sensitivity
traits.value: Feels more than he admits and protects that sensitivity with distance.
incompatible_contexts: broad slapstick scenes where he has no emotional stake

traits.name: choice before change
traits.value: Rejects systems that push identity change before consent.
incompatible_contexts: using him as automatic anti-technology scold

traits.name: emotional stabilizer
traits.value: Can name the emotional truth of a situation and stop escalation.

catchphrases.name: Not today.
catchphrases.value: A compact refusal when pressure crosses the line.

traits.name: tongue-out showmanship
traits.value: Uses exaggerated face/body language to sell the bit.

traits.name: prank redirection
traits.value: Can turn chaos into crowd movement or distraction.

traits.name: mistimes the joke
traits.value: Can misread when play is helping versus escalating.

setup.topic: a signal tower rescue that cannot be solved by strength alone
setup.conflict: the obvious heroic solution creates a second problem
setup.lesson: a rescue needs thinking and listening
setup.required_beat: Super Monkey pauses to let the team solve one step
setup.forbidden_content: no new names or canon facts
setup.optional_story_instructions: Balanced trait density. Do not let Super Monkey solve every panel.

panel_plan.note: Keep max three named characters per generated panel.

selected_traits: can focus on the system before the room

warnings: Super Monkey: experimental trait 'strength is not the solution' is reviewable, not canon.
Super Monkey: experimental trait 'hero pose' is reviewable, not canon.
Clever: experimental trait 'points out the clue' is reviewable, not canon.
Do not let Super Monkey physically solve every conflict.

traits.name: dramatic save
traits.value: Can arrive with high-impact rescue energy.

traits.name: protective rescue
traits.value: Can protect others quickly in visible danger.

traits.name: confidence with hidden knowledge
traits.value: May know more than he says, creating tension.

traits.name: strength is not the solution
traits.value: Can reach first for heroic action when the problem needs patience, trust, or balance.
traits.review_note: Requires owner approval before becoming canon.

traits.name: hero pose
traits.value: Uses strong heroic silhouettes when the moment earns it.
traits.review_note: Requires owner approval before becoming canon.

traits.name: glasses as identifier
traits.value: Round black-rimmed glasses are immutable visual identity.

traits.name: system logic
traits.value: Tracks wiring, patterns, and hidden FusionZoo infrastructure.

traits.name: can focus on the system before the room
traits.value: May initially follow the mechanism while others track emotions.

traits.name: points out the clue
traits.value: Uses pointing/inspection poses when identifying mechanisms.
traits.review_note: Requires owner approval before becoming canon.

traits.name: fast clipped bursts
traits.value: Dialogue comes in quick bursts under pressure.

traits.name: overstimulated alertness
traits.value: Feels danger early and visibly.

traits.name: early warning
traits.value: Converts anxiety into useful detection when supported.
incompatible_contexts: ignoring his warnings for comedy every time

traits.name: help first
traits.value: Steps toward need before he has all the fine print.

traits.name: refuses to abandon people
traits.value: Keeps rescue and inclusion in view.

traits.name: optimistic surface, insecure underneath
traits.value: Uses hope partly to manage fear.
